reference_scope: aMule/eMule SharedFileList, KnownFile, UploadQueue, UploadClient, ClientCredits; MLDonkey share model
target_behavior: Completed/downloaded and imported shared files are indexed with validated disk metadata, file status, hashset, AICH, Source Exchange, and part-serving responses. Secure identification remains unadvertised until a full key/signature flow exists.

notes: Friend slots, GUI queue controls, shared-directory browsing, chat/social UI, collection priority slots, and legacy clients.met ownership remain pruned or replaced by aria2-next-native state.
